creator: freebsd@lanter-it.ch
text:
The patch with 'hw.acpi.isa_irq_override_polarity' also works for me. i.e. with 'set hw.acpi.isa_irq_override_polarity=1' the internal keyboard and the mouse behave the same as an unpatched kernel.

With 0 or without override it works as expected.

@John Baldwin
Thank you. I like the solution with the tunable variable.
